import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from transformers import CLIPModel

class WildsModel(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_classes=182, model_name='openai/clip-vit-large-patch14'):
        super().__init__()
        clip = CLIPModel.from_pretrained(model_name)
        self.vision_model = clip.vision_model
        # Delete text model to save memory
        del clip.text_model
        self.fc = nn.Linear(clip.config.vision_config.hidden_size, num_classes)
        
    def forward(self, x):
        outputs = self.vision_model(pixel_values=x)
        pooled_output = outputs.pooler_output
        return self.fc(pooled_output)
